retrieved_result: Follow the Rules When Rolling Over Your Pension to an IRA Many companies are closing out their pension plans, giving workers the opportunity to roll them over to an IRA or another plan. This situation was created by the high cost of maintaining these pensions due mainly to our longer life expectancy. Done correctly, rollovers are tax neutral; done incorrec
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses pension rollovers to an IRA, not Docker or any related setup for beginners; content is unrelated to the query.
